case_title: PANFILO ARMAS VS. KARIM AHMAD FAKHRY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-05-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARMAS, PANFILO DBA AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FAKHRY, KARIM AHMAD $1,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,230.00, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-05-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-05-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF PANFILO ARMAS. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT KARIM AHMAD FAKHRY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT FAKHRY, KARIM AHMAD
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,210.55 FILED BY ARMAS, PANFILO DBA AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT FAKHRY, KARIM AHMAD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-05-2016 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
